Package org.eventb.internal.core.seqprover

  • Method Details

    • makeParameterSetting

      public IParameterSetting makeParameterSetting()
      Description copied from interface: IParameterizerDescriptor
      Returns a parameter setting initialized with default parameter values.
      Specified by:
      makeParameterSetting in interface IParameterizerDescriptor
      Returns:
      a parameter setting

    • getTacticDescriptor

      public ITacticDescriptor getTacticDescriptor()
      Description copied from interface: IParameterizerDescriptor
      Returns the descriptor of this parameterizer, viewed as a tactic.

      Returned descriptor can NOT be instantiated. Any attempt to call ITacticDescriptor.getTacticInstance() on returned object will throw an UnsupportedOperationException. Call IParameterizerDescriptor.instantiate(IParameterValuation, String) instead.

      Specified by:
      getTacticDescriptor in interface IParameterizerDescriptor
      Returns:
      a tactic descriptor

    • instantiate

      public IParamTacticDescriptor instantiate(IParameterValuation valuation, String id)
      Description copied from interface: IParameterizerDescriptor
      Returns a descriptor for the tactic obtained by instantiating this parameterizer with the given parameters .

      A parameter valuation can be customized by IParameterizerDescriptor.makeParameterSetting().

      This is a convenience method fully equivalent to calling instantiate(id, null, null, valuation).

      Specified by:
      instantiate in interface IParameterizerDescriptor
      Parameters:
      valuation - a parameter valuation
      id - the id of the resulting tactic
      Returns:
      a tactic

    • instantiate

      public IParamTacticDescriptor instantiate(String id, String name, String description, IParameterValuation valuation)
      Description copied from interface: IParameterizerDescriptor
      Returns a descriptor for the tactic obtained by instantiating this parameterizer with the given parameters .

      A parameter valuation can be customized by IParameterizerDescriptor.makeParameterSetting().

      Specified by:
      instantiate in interface IParameterizerDescriptor
      Parameters:
      id - the id of the resulting tactic
      name - the name of the resulting tactic. May be null, in which case the name of this parameterizer will be used
      description - the id description of the resulting tactic. May be null, in which case the description of this parameterizer will be used
      valuation - a parameter valuation
      Returns:
      a new tactic with the given id
